import { THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID } from "./constants.js";
const key = (suffix) => `${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.${suffix}`;
export const themeStudioLabel = (suffix, defaultMessage, description) => ({
    key: key(suffix),
    defaultMessage,
    description,
});
export const themeStudioLabels = {
    manifestDisplayName: themeStudioLabel("manifest.displayName", "Theme Studio"),
    manifestDescription: themeStudioLabel("manifest.description", "Theme tools for tokens, preview, and export."),
    commandOpenTitle: themeStudioLabel("commands.open.title", "Open Theme Studio"),
    commandOpenDescription: themeStudioLabel("commands.open.description", "Open the theme tools."),
    viewTitle: themeStudioLabel("view.title", "Theme Studio"),
    viewDescription: themeStudioLabel("view.description", "Edit, preview, and export themes."),
    railTitle: themeStudioLabel("rail.title", "Theme Studio"),
    settingsTitle: themeStudioLabel("settings.title", "Theme Studio settings"),
    settingsDescription: themeStudioLabel("settings.description", "Set preview and export defaults."),
    settingsPreviewTitle: themeStudioLabel("settings.sections.preview.title", "Preview"),
    settingsPreviewDescription: themeStudioLabel("settings.sections.preview.description", "Controls draft preview behavior."),
    settingsExportTitle: themeStudioLabel("settings.sections.export.title", "Export"),
    settingsExportDescription: themeStudioLabel("settings.sections.export.description", "Controls default export formatting and package scaffolding."),
    autoPreviewLabel: themeStudioLabel("settings.fields.autoPreview.label", "Preview draft edits automatically"),
    autoPreviewDescription: themeStudioLabel("settings.fields.autoPreview.description", "Preview token edits immediately through the host theme preview APIs."),
    defaultExportTargetLabel: themeStudioLabel("settings.fields.defaultExportTarget.label", "Default CSS export target"),
    defaultExportTargetDescription: themeStudioLabel("settings.fields.defaultExportTarget.description", "Choose whether CSS exports should target host variables or renderer/editor bridge variables by default."),
    compactCssLabel: themeStudioLabel("settings.fields.compactCss.label", "Export compact CSS"),
    compactCssDescription: themeStudioLabel("settings.fields.compactCss.description", "Render CSS exports on a single compact line."),
    packagePrefixLabel: themeStudioLabel("settings.fields.packagePrefix.label", "Package name prefix"),
    packagePrefixDescription: themeStudioLabel("settings.fields.packagePrefix.description", "Prefix used when scaffolding theme package artifacts."),
    defaultAuthorLabel: themeStudioLabel("settings.fields.defaultAuthor.label", "Default export author"),
    defaultAuthorDescription: themeStudioLabel("settings.fields.defaultAuthor.description", "Default author metadata inserted into exported presets and package scaffolds."),
    headerTitle: themeStudioLabel("panel.header.title", "Theme Studio"),
    headerSubtitle: themeStudioLabel("panel.header.subtitle", "Tokens, preview, and exports."),
    actionClose: themeStudioLabel("panel.actions.close", "Close"),
    actionRefresh: themeStudioLabel("panel.actions.refresh", "Refresh"),
    actionPreview: themeStudioLabel("panel.actions.preview", "Preview draft"),
    actionApply: themeStudioLabel("panel.actions.apply", "Apply draft"),
    actionRevert: themeStudioLabel("panel.actions.revert", "Revert draft"),
    actionExport: themeStudioLabel("panel.actions.export", "Generate exports"),
    actionUseDefault: themeStudioLabel("panel.actions.useDefault", "Use default"),
    actionClearDraft: themeStudioLabel("panel.actions.clearDraft", "Clear draft"),
    actionCopyCurrent: themeStudioLabel("panel.actions.copyCurrent", "Copy current"),
    actionEditToken: themeStudioLabel("panel.actions.editToken", "Edit token"),
    actionEditClassToken: themeStudioLabel("panel.actions.editClassToken", "Edit class token"),
    tokenCompactHint: themeStudioLabel("panel.tokens.compactHint", "Compact token controls: edit value, pick color where applicable, copy current, reset default, or clear draft."),
    classStyleEditorTitle: themeStudioLabel("panel.classes.styleEditor.title", "Class style tokens"),
    classStyleEditorDescription: themeStudioLabel("panel.classes.styleEditor.description", "Edit the token-backed styles that feed this class contract. Tokens remain the source of truth; class controls are scoped shortcuts."),
    classStyleNoTokens: themeStudioLabel("panel.classes.styleEditor.empty", "No editable token shortcuts are published for this class."),
    tokenInspectorTitle: themeStudioLabel("panel.tokens.title", "Token inspector"),
    tokenInspectorDescription: themeStudioLabel("panel.tokens.description", "Edit every CSS token in the theme contract. Color-like tokens include swatches and native color pickers for fast authoring."),
    classInspectorTitle: themeStudioLabel("panel.classes.title", "Class/token relationships"),
    classInspectorDescription: themeStudioLabel("panel.classes.description", "Shows which renderer/editor bridge token groups are relevant to each stable class contract entry."),
    previewTitle: themeStudioLabel("panel.preview.title", "Live preview surface"),
    previewDescription: themeStudioLabel("panel.preview.description", "Renderer and editor previews use the same shared package bridges consumed by the workspace."),
    exportTitle: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.title", "Exports"),
    exportDescription: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.description", "Generate JSON, CSS, and portable package scaffold artifacts from the current effective token map."),
    metadataTitle: themeStudioLabel("panel.metadata.title", "Export metadata"),
    metadataThemeName: themeStudioLabel("panel.metadata.themeName", "Theme name"),
    metadataThemeId: themeStudioLabel("panel.metadata.themeId", "Theme id"),
    metadataPackageName: themeStudioLabel("panel.metadata.packageName", "Package name"),
    metadataAuthor: themeStudioLabel("panel.metadata.author", "Author"),
    metadataDescription: themeStudioLabel("panel.metadata.description", "Description"),
    labelCategory: themeStudioLabel("panel.labels.category", "Category"),
    labelDefault: themeStudioLabel("panel.labels.default", "Default"),
    labelCurrent: themeStudioLabel("panel.labels.current", "Current"),
    labelDraft: themeStudioLabel("panel.labels.draft", "Draft"),
    labelEffective: themeStudioLabel("panel.labels.effective", "Effective"),
    labelColorPicker: themeStudioLabel("panel.labels.colorPicker", "Color picker"),
    labelTokenValue: themeStudioLabel("panel.labels.tokenValue", "Token value"),
    labelScope: themeStudioLabel("panel.labels.scope", "Scope"),
    labelBridgeTarget: themeStudioLabel("panel.labels.bridgeTarget", "Bridge target"),
    labelTokens: themeStudioLabel("panel.labels.tokens", "Source tokens"),
    labelNoRelationships: themeStudioLabel("panel.labels.noRelationships", "No class relationships available."),
    labelJsonExport: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.json", "Theme preset JSON"),
    labelCssExport: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.css", "CSS export"),
    labelRendererCssExport: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.rendererCss", "Renderer bridge CSS"),
    labelEditorCssExport: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.editorCss", "Editor bridge CSS"),
    labelPackageArtifact: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.packageArtifact", "Theme package artifact"),
    actionDownloadJson: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.downloadJson", "Download JSON"),
    actionDownloadCss: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.downloadCss", "Download CSS"),
    actionDownloadPackage: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.downloadPackage", "Download package artifact"),
    statusReady: themeStudioLabel("status.ready", "Ready"),
    statusBusy: themeStudioLabel("status.busy", "Working…"),
    statusApplied: themeStudioLabel("status.applied", "Draft applied"),
    statusReverted: themeStudioLabel("status.reverted", "Draft reverted"),
    statusExported: themeStudioLabel("status.exported", "Exports generated"),
    diagnosticsReady: themeStudioLabel("diagnostics.ready", "Theme Studio activated successfully."),
    diagnosticsPreviewed: themeStudioLabel("diagnostics.previewed", "Theme Studio previewed the current draft successfully."),
    diagnosticsApplied: themeStudioLabel("diagnostics.applied", "Theme Studio applied the current draft successfully."),
    diagnosticsReverted: themeStudioLabel("diagnostics.reverted", "Theme Studio reverted the current draft successfully."),
    diagnosticsExported: themeStudioLabel("diagnostics.exported", "Theme Studio generated theme exports successfully."),
    diagnosticsFailed: themeStudioLabel("diagnostics.failed", "Theme Studio encountered an error while processing the draft."),
    notificationApplied: themeStudioLabel("notifications.applied", "Theme draft applied."),
    notificationReverted: themeStudioLabel("notifications.reverted", "Theme draft reverted."),
    notificationExported: themeStudioLabel("notifications.exported", "Theme exports generated."),
    settingsShortcutKicker: themeStudioLabel("settings.shortcut.kicker", "Theme Studio"),
    settingsShortcutTitle: themeStudioLabel("settings.shortcut.title", "Theme Studio"),
    settingsShortcutDescription: themeStudioLabel("settings.shortcut.description", "Open theme tools for preview and export."),
    settingsStatsThemeId: themeStudioLabel("settings.stats.themeId", "Theme ID"),
    settingsStatsTokens: themeStudioLabel("settings.stats.tokens", "TOKENS"),
    settingsStatsRelationships: themeStudioLabel("settings.stats.relationships", "RELATIONSHIPS"),
    settingsStatsStatus: themeStudioLabel("settings.stats.status", "STATUS"),
    settingsChipPaneOnly: themeStudioLabel("settings.chips.paneOnly", "Pane only"),
    settingsChipSplitSingle: themeStudioLabel("settings.chips.splitSingle", "SPLIT + SINGLE"),
    settingsChipSettingsContent: themeStudioLabel("settings.chips.settingsContent", "Settings content"),
    settingsChipEnglishFallback: themeStudioLabel("settings.chips.englishFallback", "English fallback"),
    settingsOpenStudio: themeStudioLabel("settings.actions.openStudio", "Open studio"),
    panelKicker: themeStudioLabel("panel.kicker", "Theme Studio"),
    browserChip: themeStudioLabel("browser.chip", "Theme browser"),
    browserFilterPlaceholder: themeStudioLabel("browser.filter.placeholder", "Filter tokens, selectors, exports"),
    browserFilterAria: themeStudioLabel("browser.filter.aria", "Filter theme browser"),
    browserSectionMetadata: themeStudioLabel("browser.sections.metadata", "Metadata"),
    browserSectionTokens: themeStudioLabel("browser.sections.tokens", "Tokens"),
    browserSectionTypography: themeStudioLabel("browser.sections.typography", "Typography"),
    browserSectionRelationships: themeStudioLabel("browser.sections.relationships", "Relationships"),
    browserSectionExports: themeStudioLabel("browser.sections.exports", "Exports"),
    browserTokenTitle: themeStudioLabel("browser.tokens.title", "Token browser"),
    browserRelationshipTitle: themeStudioLabel("browser.relationships.title", "Relationship browser"),
    browserEmptyTokens: themeStudioLabel("browser.tokens.empty", "No tokens match."),
    browserEmptyRelationships: themeStudioLabel("browser.relationships.empty", "No relationships match."),
    exportTargetHostCss: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.target.hostCss", "Host CSS"),
    exportTargetRendererCss: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.target.rendererCss", "Renderer CSS"),
    exportTargetEditorCss: themeStudioLabel("panel.export.target.editorCss", "Editor CSS"),
    toolbarLabel: themeStudioLabel("toolbar.label", "Theme Studio toolbar"),
    toolbarToggleSidebar: themeStudioLabel("toolbar.toggleSidebar", "Toggle sidebar"),
    toolbarSinglePane: themeStudioLabel("toolbar.singlePane", "Single pane"),
    toolbarSplitScreen: themeStudioLabel("toolbar.splitScreen", "Split screen"),
    toolbarRefresh: themeStudioLabel("toolbar.refresh", "Refresh theme data"),
    toolbarImport: themeStudioLabel("toolbar.import", "Import theme package"),
    toolbarPreview: themeStudioLabel("toolbar.preview", "Preview draft theme"),
    toolbarApply: themeStudioLabel("toolbar.apply", "Apply draft theme"),
    toolbarRevert: themeStudioLabel("toolbar.revert", "Revert draft theme"),
    toolbarClose: themeStudioLabel("toolbar.close", "Close studio"),
    toolbarResizePanes: themeStudioLabel("toolbar.resizePanes", "Resize Theme Studio panes"),
};
export const themeStudioLocaleLoader = {
    defaultLocale: "en",
    fallbackLocale: "en",
    loaders: {
        en: async () => (await import("./locales/en.js")).themeStudioEnCatalog,
        es: async () => (await import("./locales/es.js")).themeStudioEsCatalog,
    },
};
//# sourceMappingURL=i18n.js.map

import { THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID } from "../constants.js";
import { themeStudioLabels } from "../i18n.js";
export const themeStudioEnCatalog = {
    locale: "en",
    messages: {
        ...Object.fromEntries(Object.values(themeStudioLabels).map((label) => [label.key, label.defaultMessage])),
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.manifest.displayName`]: "Theme Studio",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.manifest.description`]: "Bundled theme authoring extension for inspecting tokens, previewing renderer/editor bridges, and exporting portable theme artifacts.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.commands.open.title`]: "Open Theme Studio",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.commands.open.description`]: "Open the bundled theme authoring workspace.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.view.title`]: "Theme Studio",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.view.description`]: "Inspect, preview, apply, revert, and export themes against the formal token/class contract.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.rail.title`]: "Theme Studio",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.header.title`]: "Theme Studio",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.header.subtitle`]: "Token inspector, class relationship inspector, live renderer/editor previews, and portable theme exports.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.actions.close`]: "Close",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.actions.refresh`]: "Refresh",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.actions.preview`]: "Preview draft",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.actions.apply`]: "Apply draft",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.actions.revert`]: "Revert draft",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.actions.export`]: "Generate exports",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.status.ready`]: "Ready",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.status.busy`]: "Working…",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.status.applied`]: "Draft applied",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.status.reverted`]: "Draft reverted",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.status.exported`]: "Exports generated",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.shortcut.kicker`]: "Theme Studio",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.shortcut.title`]: "Theme Studio",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.shortcut.description`]: "Open the pane workspace to inspect token bridges, preview renderer/editor output, and export portable theme artifacts.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.stats.themeId`]: "Theme ID",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.stats.tokens`]: "TOKENS",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.stats.relationships`]: "RELATIONSHIPS",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.stats.status`]: "STATUS",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.chips.paneOnly`]: "Pane only",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.chips.splitSingle`]: "SPLIT + SINGLE",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.chips.englishFallback`]: "English fallback",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.actions.openStudio`]: "Open studio"
    }
};
//# sourceMappingURL=en.js.map

import { THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID } from "../constants.js";
import { themeStudioLabels } from "../i18n.js";
export const themeStudioEsCatalog = {
    locale: "es",
    messages: {
        ...Object.fromEntries(Object.values(themeStudioLabels).map((label) => [label.key, label.defaultMessage])),
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.manifest.displayName`]: "Estudio de Temas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.manifest.description`]: "Extensión integrada para crear temas, inspeccionar tokens, previsualizar puentes de render/editor y exportar artefactos portátiles.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.commands.open.title`]: "Abrir Estudio de Temas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.commands.open.description`]: "Abre el espacio integrado de edición de temas.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.view.title`]: "Estudio de Temas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.view.description`]: "Inspecciona, previsualiza, aplica, revierte y exporta temas según el contrato formal de tokens y clases.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.rail.title`]: "Temas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.header.title`]: "Estudio de Temas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.header.subtitle`]: "Inspector de tokens, inspector de relaciones clase/token, vistas previas de render/editor y exportaciones portátiles.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.actions.close`]: "Cerrar",

        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.actions.export`]: "Generar exportaciones",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.status.ready`]: "Listo",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.status.busy`]: "Procesando…",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.status.applied`]: "Borrador aplicado",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.status.reverted`]: "Borrador revertido",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.status.exported`]: "Exportaciones generadas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.shortcut.kicker`]: "Estudio de temas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.shortcut.title`]: "Estudio de Temas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.shortcut.description`]: "Abre el panel de trabajo para inspeccionar puentes de tokens, previsualizar la salida del render/editor y exportar artefactos de tema portátiles.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.stats.themeId`]: "ID de tema",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.stats.tokens`]: "TOKENS",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.stats.relationships`]: "RELACIONES",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.stats.status`]: "ESTADO",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.chips.paneOnly`]: "Solo panel",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.chips.splitSingle`]: "DIVIDIDO + UNICO",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.chips.settingsContent`]: "Contenido de configuraci?n",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.chips.englishFallback`]: "Respaldo en ingl?s",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.settings.actions.openStudio`]: "Abrir estudio",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.kicker`]: "Estudio de temas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.chip`]: "Navegador de temas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.filter.placeholder`]: "Filtrar tokens, selectores, exportaciones",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.filter.aria`]: "Filtrar navegador de temas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.sections.metadata`]: "Metadatos",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.sections.tokens`]: "Tokens",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.sections.typography`]: "Tipografia",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.sections.relationships`]: "Relaciones",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.sections.exports`]: "Exportaciones",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.tokens.title`]: "Navegador de tokens",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.relationships.title`]: "Navegador de relaciones",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.tokens.empty`]: "Ningun token coincide.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.browser.relationships.empty`]: "Ninguna relacion coincide.",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.export.target.hostCss`]: "CSS del host",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.export.target.rendererCss`]: "CSS del renderizador",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.panel.export.target.editorCss`]: "CSS del editor",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.toolbar.label`]: "Barra de herramientas del Estudio de Temas",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.toolbar.toggleSidebar`]: "Alternar barra lateral",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.toolbar.singlePane`]: "Panel unico",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.toolbar.splitScreen`]: "Pantalla dividida",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.toolbar.refresh`]: "Actualizar datos del tema",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.toolbar.import`]: "Importar paquete de tema",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.toolbar.preview`]: "Previsualizar borrador de tema",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.toolbar.apply`]: "Aplicar borrador de tema",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.toolbar.revert`]: "Revertir borrador de tema",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.toolbar.close`]: "Cerrar estudio",
        [`${THEME_STUDIO_EXTENSION_ID}.toolbar.resizePanes`]: "Redimensionar paneles del Estudio de Temas"
    }
};

# @mdwrk/extension-theme-studio

First-party Theme Studio extension package for MdWrk.

## Manifest and compatibility

- manifest export: `./manifest`
- bundled entry export: `./bundled`
- compatibility declarations: host API, runtime, app, and theme contract ranges are declared in `src/manifest.ts`
- lifecycle model: bundled first-party extension activated through `@mdwrk/extension-runtime`

## Capabilities

- inspect formal theme tokens and stable class contracts
- edit token drafts without importing client internals
- preview renderer/editor bridge behavior against shared package contracts
- apply or revert theme drafts through host theme APIs
- export theme presets as JSON, CSS, and theme-package scaffold artifacts
- register commands, a pane-first workspace view, an action-rail item, and settings-menu content

## Settings schema

The package ships a settings schema covering:

- preview behavior
- export defaults
- package scaffold metadata

Source anchors:

- `src/settings.ts`
- `src/manifest.ts`

## i18n readiness

The package ships package-local locale catalogs and loader definitions:

- `src/i18n.ts`
- `src/locales/en.ts`
- `src/locales/es.ts`

All user-facing manifest/view/settings labels are `I18nLabel` descriptors.

## Lifecycle and host/runtime integration tests

- `tests/run-smoke.mjs` exercises manifest structure, settings resolution, class relationships, export generation, theme bridge previews, and service behavior against a mocked host/runtime context

## Install / configuration guidance

This package is intended for first-party bundling into `apps/client`.
Use it when validating the portable theme/token contract, editor/renderer bridge behavior, and generated theme export artifacts.

## API/reference docs

See the generated reference page at:

- `docs/reference/packages/mdwrk-extension-theme-studio.md`
